title: whiteboard
blurb: Multimodal AI study app. Gemini turns lecture audio, photos, and PDFs into unified Markdown notes, with a RAG chat panel that answers from your own uploads. Async Django pipeline keeps the request under 500ms even while the AI works in the background.

title: tacktack
blurb: Task manager that turns natural-language strings into structured schedules via Groq. Handles daily-to-yearly recurrence, hierarchical subtasks, and descriptive tags. 4-pane React dashboard with custom smart views and per-user data isolation.
